directions: Enter through the main campus gate, walk straight past the central fountain, and the library is the large glass building on your left.
Enter the Administrative Block, take the stairs on your left to the 1st floor, and walk down the corridor to Room 104.
Enter Engineering Block C, take the elevator to the 3rd floor, turn right, and walk to the end of the hallway.
Enter the Administrative Block, take an immediate right after the reception desk, and it is the first office on the right.
Go to Science Block A, take the stairs to the 2nd floor, turn left, and walk past the faculty cabins to the double-door lab.
Head to the 2nd floor of Science Block A, and the lab is located directly opposite the elevator exit.
Walk to the Student Activity Center behind the sports ground; the cafeteria entrance is on the right side of the main lobby.
From the main entrance, follow the path past the football field, enter the SAC building, and the sports complex is on the ground floor.
Head towards the Hostel Block D entrance; the health center is in the adjacent annex building next to the pharmacy.
Enter the Administrative Block, take the elevator to the 2nd floor, turn left, and walk past the main meeting room.
Walk to the 1st floor of the Main Block, walk straight past the lounge, and the double doors to Seminar Hall A are on your left.
Enter Engineering Block C, take the stairs to the 2nd floor, turn left, and the department office is the third door on the right.
Walk to the 1st floor of Science Block B, turn right at the notice board, and the office is next to the library room.
Head to the 3rd floor of the Bio-Science Block, walk straight down the corridor, and the lab is on the left before the greenhouse.
Enter the Mechanical Engineering Block from the rear entrance, walk past the CNC machine shop, and the lab is on your right.
Walk into the Administrative Block main entrance, and the admissions office is located directly behind the main inquiry desk.
Walk into the Administrative Block lobby, and the accounts desk is located directly to your left across from the admissions desk.
Immediately after entering the campus main gate, take the first right turn; the auditorium is the large dome-shaped building.
Head to the 2nd floor of the Humanities Block, turn right, and the lab is the second door on the left.
Take the elevator to the 4th floor of the Design Block, turn left, and it is located at the end of the corridor.
Go to the 1st floor of the SAC building, turn right, and the counseling center is located in a quiet corridor at the end.
Take the elevator to the 3rd floor of the Administrative Block, turn right, and walk past the board room entrance.
Take the stairs to the 2nd floor of the SAC, turn left, and the Senate Hall is the large double-door room on the left.
Take the stairs to the 1st floor of the Administrative Block, turn left, and walk straight to the secure access zone.
Walk to the ground floor of the Mechanical Block, follow the signs to the workshop corridor, and enter the double doors on the left.
Enter the Electrical Engineering Block, walk down the main ground floor corridor, and the lab is the last room on the right.
Go to the ground floor of the Civil Block, walk to the rear exit near the testing yard, and the lab is on the left.
Take the elevator to the 3rd floor of the Administrative Block, turn left, and the board room is directly opposite the VC's office.
Go to the 3rd floor of the Administrative Block, take a left from the elevator, and the VC office suite is at the end of the corridor.
Go to the 1st floor of the Library Block, turn left, and the Career Guidance Cell is located next to the reference book racks.
Enter the SAC building from the front entrance, walk past the seating area, and the shop is on the left next to the food stall.

landmark: Right side of Campus Entry Gate
directions: Located immediately at the main campus entrance, in the small security building on the right side of the gates.
Walk past the faculty housing block to the Guest House building; the reception lobby is located just past the main glass doors.
Go to the ground floor of the Humanities Block, turn right from the entrance, and the common room is the second door on the left.
Walk to the ground floor of Engineering Block A, turn left at the entrance lobby, and it is located next to the sports locker room.
Walk to the 1st floor of the Placement Block, and the interview room is the first glass cabin on the left.
Head to the 1st floor of the Placement Block, walk past Interview Room 1, and Room 2 is the next cabin on the left.
Take the elevator to the 3rd floor of Block C, turn right, and the secured-access Data Center is on the left.
Go to the 2nd floor of the Administrative Block, turn right, and the IQAC office is the second door on the left.
Walk to the back exit of the SAC cafeteria, take the corridor to the left, and the NCC/NSS office is at the end.
Take the stairs to the 2nd floor of the SAC, turn right, and the soundproofed music room is the third door on the right.
Enter the Design Block, walk straight through the main lobby, and the entry to the gallery is directly ahead.

landmark: Next to Dean of Student Affairs Office
directions: Head to the 2nd floor of the Administrative Block, turn left from the elevator, and the Academic office is the second door on the right.
Enter Science Block B, walk down the ground floor hallway, and the R&D cell is on the right side.
Go to the 2nd floor of Engineering Block D, turn left, and the IoT lab is the third room on the left.
Walk to the 1st floor of the Law Block, and the Moot Court hall with the wooden double doors is on the right.
Take the stairs to the 2nd floor of the Management Block, turn right, and walk straight into the incubation open space.
Head to the 1st floor of Block D, turn right, and the lab is located halfway down the corridor on the left.
Take the central library stairs to the 1st floor, walk past the book racks, and turn right into the computer terminal zone.
Go to the 1st floor of the Administrative Block, turn left, and the Controller's office is the secure cabin at the end of the hallway.
